title: desmodium radicans
intro: Desmodium radicans, also known as tick clover or beggar's lice, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been used to promote overall health by reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and supporting the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Desmodium radicans include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
